metadata.rationale: 本文は一見具体的だが、提示された根拠は合成的な要約記録しかなく、事故発生や時刻などの詳細を裏づける実在証拠が示されていない。加えて主画像は生成画像で、本文の美浜3号機・当該日時の出来事を写した記録写真として扱うと誤認を招く。

best_trajectory.thought: I need to verify if this specific incident (Minami-Hama Unit 3 steam leak and manual shutdown) actually happened on the date mentioned. I will search Google for the specific news snippet or the incident details.
best_trajectory.action: Google[関西電力 美浜発電所3号機 運転中 高圧タービン 蒸気漏えい 手動停止]
best_trajectory.observation:
[Answer Box] 関西電力は８日、定格出力で運転中の美浜原発３号機（福井県美浜町）のタービン建屋内で、蒸気が漏れたとして原子炉を手動で停止しました。 関電によると同日午前４時８分、３号機のタービン建屋で、高圧タービンのカバーで温度差の異常を感知して警報が作動。
[PDF] 美浜発電所3号機の原子炉手動停止 - 関西電力: ... 運転員が高圧タ. ービン周辺より蒸気が漏えいしていることをタービン建屋内の監視カメ. ラで確認したことから、04時24分に原子炉を手動停止しました。 (https://www.kepco.co.jp/corporate/pr/2026/pdf/20260508_1j.pdf)
関西電力美浜3号機で蒸気漏れ、原子炉手動停止 5月8日朝 - 福井新聞: 美浜3号機は24年10月にも運転中に原子炉補助建屋内の海水が通る2次系配管で減肉が見つかって手動停止した。高圧タービンからの蒸気漏れは、08年に定期検査 ... (https://www.fukuishimbun.co.jp/articles/-/2595289)
美浜原発3号機の高圧タービンから蒸気漏れ 県が徹底した原因究明と ...: このトラブルは、5月8日に美浜原発3号機の高圧タービンを覆うカバー上部にある金属製キャップに穴が開き、蒸気が漏れて、原子炉を手動停止したものです。 (https://news.yahoo.co.jp/articles/fcf7a4800ec3dfe1dabe81c0767c01eb7d7e5353)
美浜原発3号機、原子炉を手動停止 高圧タービン周辺で蒸気漏れ: 蒸気漏れがわかったため、午前4時24分に原子炉を手動で止めた。午前4時43分に蒸気漏れが止まったことを確認したという。 美浜原発3号機は1976年12月に運転 ... (https://www.asahi.com/articles/ASV577R8ZV57PGJB001M.html)
美浜原発3号機、原子炉手動停止 高圧タービン周辺で蒸気漏れ: 関西電力は8日、稼働中の美浜原発3号機（福井県美浜町）の高圧タービン周辺で同日午前4時10分ごろに蒸気が漏れているのが見つかったため、約15分後に ... (https://www.threads.com/@kobeshinbun/post/DYDoAK-kv2G/%E7%BE%8E%E6%B5%9C%E5%8E%9F%E7%99%BA%EF%BC%93%E5%8F%B7%E6%A9%9F%E5%8E%9F%E5%AD%90%E7%82%89%E6%89%8B%E5%8B%95%E5%81%9C%E6%AD%A2-%E9%AB%98%E5%9C%A7%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC%E3%83%93%E3%83%B3%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%A7%E8%92%B8%E6%B0%97%E6%BC%8F%E3%82%8Chttpswwwkobe-npcojpnewszenkokucompact202605002033085/)

best_trajectory.thought: The search results, particularly from KEPCO's official press release and major news outlets like Asahi and Yahoo, confirm almost all details in the news text: the manual shutdown at 04:24, the leak confirmation by monitoring camera, the stoppage of the leak at 04:43, and the cause being a steam leak from the high-pressure turbine area. The specifics match closely enough to verify the text as factual.

The text discusses a steam leak at Mihama Plant, but the image displays a control panel with a sign indicating Unit 1 reactor manual stoppage at Fukushima Daiichi on March 12, 2011. These are contradictory facts regarding the specific facility and incident type shown.
best_trajectory.observation:
- **No obvious signs of AI/synthetic generation:** The scene has consistent perspective (control-room panels receding correctly), coherent lighting and shadows, and natural-looking depth of field (foreground blur, midground sharpness).
- **No clear compositing/cut-and-paste artifacts:** Edges around people, consoles, and instruments look clean without halos, mismatched noise, or inconsistent sharpness that would suggest splicing.
- **Text/signage looks coherent:** The Japanese sign at the top (“1号機 原子炉手動停止中 …”) appears naturally integrated with the wall and lighting, not warped or broken in a way typical of generative errors.
- **Visible intentional obfuscation:** The workers’ faces are blurred/pixelated, which is a common privacy edit in news photos. The blur is localized to faces and does not introduce other inconsistencies.

**Overall:** The image appears to be an authentic photograph of a control room, with deliberate face-blurring as the only evident edit.

best_trajectory.thought: The news text reports a steam leak at the "Mihama Power Station Unit 3". However, the image displays a sign clearly stating "Unit 1 Reactor Manual Stoppage" (1号機...手動停止中) and a date of March 12, 2011 (Fukushima Daiichi). The facility name and unit number in the image contradict the text.

The news text describes an event happening on the 8th. I need to check if the image shows a specific date that contradicts this. The sign mentions a year ending in "23" and March 12, suggesting an older historical context (2011) rather than a recent event.
best_trajectory.action: VQA[What date is written on the white sign hanging on the wall?]
best_trajectory.observation: The date written on the white sign is **平成 23 年 3 月 12 日** (which corresponds to March 12, 2011).

best_trajectory.thought: The news text describes an event on the "8th", while the sign in the image clearly displays the date "Heisei 23, March 12" (平成 23 年 3 月 12 日). Additionally, the text describes a specific accident at Unit 3, whereas the image shows a control room status for Unit 1. I will ask the VQA to read the whole text on the sign to confirm these details.
best_trajectory.action: VQA[Please read the full text on the white sign hanging on the upper wall.]
best_trajectory.observation:
1 号機 原子炉 手動停止中
平成 23 年 3 月 12 日

best_trajectory.thought: Given that the news text specifies Unit 3 and links to a recent event ("the 8th"), while the image explicitly displays "Unit 1" and the date "March 12, Heisei 23" (March 12, 2011), there is a fundamental contradiction between the subject matter (Unit number) and the timeline. The mismatch is significant enough to conclude immediately.

prediction.taxonomy_rationale: The text reports a Minamihami Unit 3 steam leak, while the provided image displays a sign for Unit 1 and a date from March 2011, indicating a mismatched time and place for the event described.
